items.caption:
When’s the last time you cleaned your pantry? My parents loved how clean and organized the pantry was. It only took a couple hours to do! I left everything on my Amazon storefront linked in my bio!
•
#clean #organize #cleanwithme #pantry #kitchen
items.transcript: This is my parents' pantry and today we're organizing it. So come with me. But before we can start to organize, I have to throw away everything that doesn't work anymore and everything that's expired since they have not been in this house for about six months. So let's get into it. Out with the old, in with the new. And before you come at me saying, oh my God, why would you do this? I bet they were so mad. Stop it right there. Of course I did call them and said, hey, I want to do this because when you get home, all you're going to have is expired food. And they were okay with it. But not only that, I also gave their pantry like a deep cleaning. So they were very happy. It's not perfect. I definitely need to go grocery shopping for them and I ordered more containers. However, I'm going to start labeling them with these amazing labels that I got from Amazon. So let's get into it. And of course you already know that every single organizer and also the labels I got from Amazon. So you already know that. And this is the after. How pretty. I loved it and they loved it.

items.caption:
We clean our trash clean weekly. I didn’t think it was crazy but everyone thinks it is! How often do you clean your trash can?
•
#clean #cleanwithme #tips #trash #howto
items.transcript: Apparently, you guys think we're crazy because Alex and I like to clean our trash cans every week after the trash has been picked up. But we cannot be the only ones that do this. Now, I get it, we might be the only ones that do it every week, but I am sure someone out there is cleaning their trash cans at least once a month or every other month, or at least when they get really, really stinky and nasty. But in all honesty, you guys, this takes like five to ten minutes. We spray it, we do some soap, and we do a little scrubby scrub, and we're done. Easy.

items.caption:
I left @zepusa foaming wall cleaner linked in my bio and stories!! I highly recommend using an eggshell finish for your walls so they are easily wipe able and cleaned. Color of my paint: Studio Beige by Sherwin Williams 
•
Steps:
1. Get your @zepusa foaming wall cleaner and a white towel
2. Spray where there are stains on your wall.
3. Wipe away
ALL DONE!!
•
#clean #howto #trending #cleanwithme
items.transcript: Today a guy came to change this window that was foggy and we just noticed that he got stains on our wall and our baseboards. I'm guessing from his jeans. So we're gonna clean that. I'm gonna be using Steps Foaming Wall Cleaner. This works amazing for doors, for baseboards, for everything. It's just so good. And a white towel. You don't want any other color because you don't want any color transfer. And this is how easy it is. Spray, imagine it in parts, and then just wipe. Boom. Gone. Here. So easy and fast. Alright, we're gonna keep going. I'm gonna do the baseboard. Super fast and super easy to clean. Look at that. We're all done. So much better. This works really, really good. I love it.

items.caption:
Being kind costs you nothing. 
•
#clean #howto #tips #bekind #trending
items.transcript: You took me out of my grave and saved my heart from

items.caption:
These are all my favorite cleaning towels!! ! don’t just use them in my own house but when I used to clean houses for people these were also my favorite!! They are linked in my bio!!
•
 #clean #towels #tips #trending #viral
items.transcript: As a former housekeeper, these are my favorite cleaning towels I use in my own house. Let's go. Number one, regular microfiber towels. These right here come in a big pack with a bunch of colors so you can use them for different areas of your house. So good. Number two, glass towels. These things right here are amazing for windows, mirrors, and glass doors. They're a game changer and you need to try them. Gray microfiber towels. These in my house are only used for stainless steel cleaner because they become oily. Number four, wet cotton towels are super low maintenance and then if you get them really, really dirty, which is what I use them for, I just bleach them in the washer. So nice. Last but not least, if you're feeling rich and you want to splurge on some good microfiber towels, these are the ones I recommend. They're by Scrub Daddy. They're plushy, they're soft, and I use them on everything that are like marble and quartz. Happy cleaning!

items.caption:
How does cleaning make you feel? 
•
#trending #clean #howto #feel #cleanwithme
items.transcript: Procura coquetearme más, y no reparo de lo que te haré. Procura ser parte de mí, y te aseguro se me hundo en ti. Procura no mirarme más, y no sabrás de qué te perderás. Es un dilema de que tú ni yo podemos escapar. Procura coquetearme más.

items.caption:
Never throw your sneakers in the washing machine!!!
•
#clean #howto #tips #cleanwithme #trending
items.transcript: How I cleaned my nephew's shoes so that I could take them from this to this. Look at that difference. Okay, I put them in a bucket with a little bit of powder detergent. Whatever you have at home is totally fine. Then I took them and put some hot water on them and left them for about 10 minutes. A brush and some gloves is really all you're gonna need. And then just, you know, just start brushing away after 10 minutes. Oh, one more thing you're gonna need, an eraser daddy sponge by scrub daddy so that he can remove all the scuffs. And that was literally it, you guys, because after that I just rinsed everything and I put them in the sun to dry. And what a difference. How pretty!

items.caption:
Like and follow for more cleaning tips!!! 
•
#clean #cleanwithme #tips ￼#cleaning
items.transcript: As someone who cleans houses for a living, I can tell you that you're not moving your washer and your dryer often enough. So to avoid this buildup, move it at least once every two to three months.

items.caption: This is my favorite way to clean the shower and how easy it is. Everything you need is already with you in the shower!! What do you think? #clean #cleanwithme #shower #trending
items.transcript: I'm a housekeeper and I will give you the best cleaning hack of your life. Get this brush or something very similar from Target. You're going to get Dawn dish soap and vinegar. Yes, I say vinegar weird. Don't make fun of me, okay? Once you're done, you're going to take it and put it inside your shower. You know where this is going, right? Now once a week when you're putting that hair mask on, take your little brush and wash your shower while showering. If you're going to follow any of my tips, please let it be this one. Like and follow for more.

items.caption:
Do you want to see a part 2 ? Also do you want to see materials I do recommend? 
•
#clean #recomendation #trending #viral
items.transcript: Material for your house that as a housekeeper I would never recommend to you because they're so hard to clean. Number one, wooden blinds. These are not only hard to clean, but they're also very time consuming. Just avoid them at all costs. Number two, natural stone floors, especially travertine. These are just a nightmare to have in your home. Trust me on that. Number three, bronze faucets. I don't know why, but these hold on to every single speck of hard water you can think of. Number three, I don't know who thought that putting a glass sink was a good idea, but it's not. And last but not least, I don't recommend you put your faucets up against the mirror because you will be able to see everything from the mirror.

items.caption:
You dont have to deep clean your refrigerator every time you clean it. You can do the Vanesa way 😉 it works great!
•
#clean #cleanwithme #howto #trending
items.transcript: Just like you, I also hate cleaning my fridge. Like, it's just horrible. If I could skip this whole thing, I would. But you can't, so let's go. Now, there's a right way to do this, but there's also the lazy Vanessa way. And that is what I'm going to be doing today because I just don't have the energy, okay? The lazy way is I'm just not taking anything out. Everything that can be taken out, I will not be doing that, okay? I'm just not going to do it. And then I'm just cleaning with soap and water at the end, just with a damp rag, rinse everything off. The only thing that I did take out was these two drawers because they were nasty. But everything else, I did not take out. And again, if you were wondering, the right way to do this is to take everything out. And again, I just didn't want to do that, so I didn't. Because I'm an adult and I can choose how to do things. I did, however, give the outside a quick wipe down, and that was it.

items.caption:
How often are you cleaning your own bathrooms?
•
#cleanwithme #bathroom #toilets #howto #trending
items.transcript: I may get canceled for this, but it needs to be said. Y'all are not cleaning your bathrooms often enough. I'm sorry, but it had to be said. You don't have to wait until it's really dirty in order for you to actually clean it. Coming from a housekeeper, I can tell you that if you brush it and you wipe it every three days, you should be good to go. Don't deep clean it once a month.

items.caption:
All you need is a @scrubdaddy eraser daddy and a little cif cleaner and your tub will look great!!! 
•
#clean #howto #trending #cleanwithme
items.transcript: But not as much as that, but there's... And this right here is what I'm going to be using. My sponge is wet and now I'm just going to apply a little bit of that. You need much, that was actually probably a lot. And now just scrub back and forth. And these are going to disappear like if it was magic. See? This is in real time, I'm not cutting, I'm not editing, nothing. Those more stubborn ones just go up and down, circles, whatever you need to do to get them off. And in just a few seconds, you will see how they disappear before your eyes. Like magic. Let's do one more. See? Boom. Easy. And that, my lovelies, cleans it for the day. Bye.

items.caption:
1. Put some music on
2. A cleaning checklist that keeps me on track (i use my cleaning guide) 
3. Clean as a family so the work goes by faster and everyone is chipping in
•
#clean #motivation #howto #trending #viral
items.transcript: Hi, my name is Vanessa, and I've been a housekeeper for more than eight years. And although I get cleaning questions every single day, the question that I get asked the most is, Vanessa, how do you have the motivation to clean your house? How do you do it? How do you actually get up from the couch and just do it? First, I always remind myself that if me or my husband don't clean our house, nobody else will come and do it. My mom isn't coming, the neighbor isn't coming, nobody cares. This is our house. So essentially, it's like I don't really have an option unless I want to live in filth, which I don't. But to answer your question, I do three things. One, always have music on. Two, have a cleaning schedule, which is why I made a cleaning ebook. And three, we always clean as a family.

items.caption:
Do you clean any of these areas?
•
#clean #tips #hacks
items.transcript: Things in your house that you might be forgetting to clean coming from a housekeeper. Let's go. Number one, if you want your fridge to continue working properly, you have to keep it clean. Just trust me on that. Number two, doors. We touch them all the time. Number three, your appliances. Number four, your baseboards. Five, your windowsills. And number six, your AC vents.

items.caption:
Guys my feet are clean and I also wipe where I stood and most importantly it’s my house!! 
•
#clean #controversial #trending #kitchen #cleanwithme
items.transcript: Apparently one of the most controversial things that I have ever posted on this page was getting on top of my own, can I repeat that again, my own countertops barefoot and then cleaning my pendants. People call me dirty, nasty, disgusting, even though I also showed that right after that I cleaned and disinfected my countertops. No, they don't care. I committed a crime and I am nasty. Okay, I guess.

items.caption:
It’s always best to do things the right way first instead of skipping steps then giving yourself much more work!
•
#cleanwithme #move #trending #clean #dusting
items.transcript: Housekeeper tip! Instead of dusting and cleaning around things, remove everything and clean under and behind things. I know you think you're saving time, but believe me, this is actually faster and easier to do.

items.caption:
I love my little brushes they are great for getting into the same tiny areas!! You can get my little brushes from @scrubdaddy website! 
•
#clean #window #howto #cleanwithme
items.transcript: In case your mom didn't teach you, this is how you clean your window rails. Let's go. You're going to start off by vacuuming or dusting. Whatever you want to do, it doesn't matter to me. Now instead of grabbing your husband's toothbrush because you're mad at him, you're going to grab one of these tiny little brushes that I created with Scrub Daddy. You can get them on their online page. And in the pink bowl, I have some pine salt and water, but you can also do dish soap and water. Whatever you want. Now scrub really well. I want to see some elbow grease put into this. Then grab a damp microfiber towel and rinse everything up. See, that's it. Yeah, you're done. See, it's very easy, but just sometimes we just don't want to do it because we're a little lazy and that's okay. But now you know how to clean your window rails. How pretty!

items.caption:
Would you organize your mom’s drawer? It’s definitely a labor of love❤️❤️
•
#clean #organizewithme  #organize #cleantok #trending
items.transcript: Would your mom or would you be okay if someone came to your house, opened your drawers, and then threw your stuff away and organized whatever was left? Well, that's kind of what's happening between me and my mom. The difference here is that my mom knows and approved of this whole idea that I had of like cleaning out her drawers, throw away her expired makeup, and there was a lot of expired makeup, but I organized everything and I didn't throw anything away that didn't need throwing. I just want to make that very clear. And again, I also did not do this without her approval or her knowledge, but she was extremely happy when she came home and came home to this drawer. How pretty!

items.caption:
When was the last time you cleaned your microwave?
•
#clean #cleanwithme #kitchen #trending #viral
items.transcript: Honestly, your microwave coming from a former housekeeper. Things I like to use is soap, towel, and sponge. You don't really need much more than that. Get your soap and your sponge and start scrubbing. This is a sponge daddy by Scrub Daddy, so, so good. And then I grab a damp microfiber towel and wipe everything. Take the plate off and wash it by hand on your sink. Wash it really well, but without breaking it. Now, on the inside, we're going to do the same thing. However, I don't spray the soap directly on the microwave, but on my sponge. Put everything back together and you should be good to go. This is the before and then this is the after. How pretty!
